g.text: Search for key 750 in tree of 1000 elements

text.tspan: // vEB layout groups tree levels into
// - Top subtree fits in 1-2 cache lines
// - Search path stays within loaded blocks
// - Each pointer chase = new cache line

// Cache MISS (200 cycles) - entire subtree loads
// All subsequent accesses: HIT (4 cycles each)
